view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a visual timezone converter.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a visual timezone converter.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a visual timezone converter.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to confirm the presence of a visual timezone converter, but the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case mentions the need for a visual timezone converter, there is no direct evidence showing its existence or effectiveness in displaying times according to each participant's timezone. This leads to an inconclusive validation regarding the requirement's coverage.
